summary: Round 3 regression — social reactions, view receipts, multi-turn AI chat, admin moderation router (summary + list + delete + cascade), and prospect QR pass auto-issuance. 17/17 backend tests pass on /app/backend/tests/test_round3.py. Frontend smoke: admin moderation page loads with summary grid, all 6 tabs (yard-sale, announcements, forum/threads, viewings, visitor-passes, ai-conversations) render successfully, search filter works. Prospect dashboard correctly shows prospect-qr-banner with embedded QR base64 image after demo M-Pesa auto-confirm.

ui_bugs.issue: Banner shows 'Expected: Invalid Date' because expected_time on the visitor pass is only a time string (e.g. '10:00'), but the JSX does `new Date(item.expected_time).toLocaleString()` (or similar) which yields Invalid Date. Either persist a full ISO datetime in payments_router auto-issue, or render expected_time directly without Date parsing.
Same Invalid Date issue likely visible in moderation Visitor Passes list (uses new Date(item.expected_time) at AdminModeration.jsx line ~230).

action_items: Optional: fix 'Invalid Date' display in prospect QR banner & moderation visitor-passes row by storing/using a full ISO datetime for expected_time (or rendering raw string).
Consider: GET /api/announcements (Form-based POST) is inconsistent with other JSON endpoints — not a Round 3 issue but noted.
All Round 3 functionality is verified end-to-end and ready to ship.
critical_code_review_comments: social_router._counts_for: aggregation pipeline uses target_id only — if a future feature lets the same target_id span multiple types, counts could collide. Consider including target_type in the match.

ai_router.ai_chat: when replaying history through LlmChat.send_message, every prior user message is re-sent through the LLM — this multiplies LLM cost per turn (O(n) per message). Consider using LlmChat with sticky session_id (already done) without replay, since the SDK persists context server-side via session_id.
admin_moderation_router.delete_announcement: cascades reactions+views but does not delete announcement attachment files on disk (orphaned files). Minor cleanup item.
visitors_router.list_passes: prospect query relies on is_prospect_pass=True boolean — must be set consistently in payments_router auto-issue path; confirmed working in regression test.
test_credentials: admin@nyumbaos.co.ke / admin123; land@demo.com / demo123; prospect created on-the-fly via /api/public/viewings (returns prospect_password).
seed_data_creation: Created throwaway data only: a few TEST_throwaway announcements (deleted by their own test), throwaway AI conversations (deleted), throwaway TPUI_ prospect bookings (left in DB; safe). No seed data destroyed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_round3.py is the canonical Round 3 regression file. Login returns access_token (not token). Announcement POST is Form-multipart (Form(...) fields), not JSON. Public viewing booking uses scheduled_date/scheduled_time and returns viewing_id + payment_id + prospect_password; STK push is auto-initiated. Demo M-Pesa callback fires in ~4-7s and auto-issues prospect QR pass with is_prospect_pass=true.
